bird.summary: Taita white-eye (Zosterops silvanus) is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. It includes numerous subspecies, sometimes considered…

locations.name: 肯尼亚
locations.summary: 肯亞共和國（斯瓦希里語：Jamhuri ya Kenya；英語：Republic of Kenya），通稱肯亞（Kenya），是位於東非，濒临印度洋，與索馬里、埃塞俄比亚、南蘇丹、烏干達、坦桑尼亚接壤，面积约58万平方公里。肯亞人口约52…

locations.name: 云雾森林
locations.summary: 云雾森林（cloud forest）是一种热带或亚热带常绿山地雨林。其特点是其林冠持续性，经常性或季节性的环绕着云雾。云雾森林的地面和植被上通常覆盖着丰富的苔藓，因此其也被称之为苔藓森林（mossy forest）。雲霧森林通常形成于山脉…

relations.subject: Taita white-eye
relations.evidence: It is only found in Taita Hills in southeastern Kenya

relations.subject: Taita white-eye
relations.evidence: |last8=Sarmento Cabral |first8=Juliano |date=July 2022 |title=Hybridization may aid evolutionary rescue of an endangered East African passerine |journal=Evolutionary Applications |volume=15 |issue=7 |pages=1177–1188 |doi=10.1111/eva.13440 |pmid=35899253 |pmc=9309464 |bibcode=2022EvApp..15.1177V |issn=1752-4571|hdl=1854/LU-01H05KG780T68Z9E9WH2758MBN |hdl-access=free }} It breeds in cloud forests. It is often observed in mixed flocks with the pale white-eye

relations.subject: Taita white-eye
relations.evidence: IUCN categorizes it as vulnerable. It is threatened by severe habitat loss and fragmentation, mainly as a result of the deforestation of the Taita Hills.{{Cite journal |last1=Vedder |first1=Daniel |last2=Lens |first2=Luc |last3=Martin |first3=Claudia A
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
